appDescription.message: Organize and clean your bookmarks with AI. Review proposed changes before applying them.

aboutDescription.message: FavorAI is a Chrome extension that uses artificial intelligence to intelligently organize your bookmarks. It analyzes your bookmark structure, detects smart duplicates and dead links, then proposes or applies semantic reorganization.

aboutPrivacyText.message: FavorAI does not collect your bookmarks. Titles, folder structure and URLs are sent to your chosen AI provider for semantic classification. No data is stored on FavorAI servers.

sectionLaunchDesc.message: The extension will analyze smart duplicates, dead links, and query AI to organize your bookmarks.

privacyNote.message: To reorganize your bookmarks, titles, folder structure and URLs are sent to the AI service you configured. No data is collected by FavorAI.

checkDeadLinksLabel.message: Check dead links, redirects and article duplicates (slow)

bookmarkFolderHelp.message: The AI will only reorganize bookmarks and subfolders inside this selected folder (allows you to target a specific folder).

deadLinksPermissionDenied.message: Permission denied — advanced link checks disabled. Grant access to all URLs to verify dead links, redirects and article duplicates.

btnMinimalTitle.message: Only organize misplaced bookmarks, without modifying the existing folder structure.

btnCompleteTitle.message: AI can rethink the entire folder structure.

logReady.message: > Ready to analyze your bookmarks. Save your API key then launch a reorganization.

bgDeadLinksProgress.message: Checking links, redirects and page content: $done$/$total$...

bgLLMInvalidTree.message: AI response does not contain a valid tree structure.

bgSendingToAIWithTokens.message: Sending to AI ($count$ bookmarks, ~$tokens$K tokens reserved)…

bgHeartbeat7.message: Finalizing response (this may take a while)…

bgAnalysisInterrupted.message: Analysis interrupted (Service Worker restarted or went offline).

bgNoChangesNeeded.message: > No changes needed. Your bookmarks are perfectly organized!

bgLargeLibraryWarning.message: ⚠️ Large bookmarks library ($count$ bookmarks). Reorganization might take longer.

dialogConfirmClearHistory.message: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.

dialogConfirmApply.message: Are you sure you want to apply the selected changes?

dialogConfirmCancel.message: Are you sure you want to cancel the analysis? All progress will be lost.

dialogConfirmRollback.message: Are you sure you want to undo this session's changes?

placeholderCustomPrompt.message: E.g. Do not touch 'Work' folder. Put recipes under 'Personal > Recipes'...

titleFetchModels.message: Load available models from the API

logFetchingModels.message: Fetching models list from the API...

logFetchModelsSuccess.message: Successfully fetched $count$ models from the API.

logFetchModelsError.message: Failed to fetch models from the API: $error$

lightConfigAlertDesc.message: Set up your API key to activate AI bookmark suggestions.

lightQuickReorgDesc.message: Clean dead links, find smart duplicates, and automatically group all your bookmarks.

addBookmarkDesc.message: Analyze the active browser tab and use AI to automatically determine the best folder location for this bookmark.

lightOnlyHttps.message: Only HTTP/HTTPS pages can be added.

lightTabNotSupportedError.message: ⚠️ This tab cannot be added to bookmarks. Navigate to a web page (http/https).

docsOverviewText.message: FavorAI is an intelligent bookmark manager that uses artificial intelligence to organize your Chrome bookmarks automatically. It analyzes your bookmark structure, detects smart duplicates and dead links, and proposes semantic reorganization.

docsFeature1.message: 📊 Smart Duplicate Detection: Finds exact matches, http/https variants, www variants, tracking URLs, redirects and similar article content

docsFeature2.message: 🔗 Dead Link Detection: Checks and marks bookmarks with broken or unreachable links

docsFeature3.message: 🤖 AI Organization: Uses multiple AI providers to suggest bookmark reorganization

docsFeature4.message: 📜 History & Rollback: Track and undo reorganization sessions

docsWorkflow.message:
1. Configure an LLM provider (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) in the Configuration tab
2. Click "Minimal" or "Complete" to start analysis
3. Review proposed changes in the checklist
4. Apply selected changes to your bookmarks
5. Track changes in the History tab

docsOpenAIText.message:
1. Visit https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
2. Log in or create a free account
3. Click "Create new secret key"
4. Copy the key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
5. Free trial includes $5 credit for testing

docsGeminiText.message:
1. Visit https://aistudio.google.com (Google AI Studio)
2. Click "Get API Key" or "Create new API key"
3. Select a Google Cloud project or create a new one
4. Copy the API key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
5. Free tier: 60 requests per minute

docsMistralText.message:
1. Visit https://console.mistral.ai
2. Log in or create a free account
3. Go to API Keys section
4. Click "Create new API key"
5. Copy the key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
6. Free trial: Limited credits for testing

docsClaudeText.message:
1. Visit https://console.anthropic.com
2. Sign in or create a free account
3. Go to API Keys section
4. Click "Create key"
5. Copy the key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
6. Free trial: Limited credits for testing

docsDeepSeekText.message:
1. Visit https://platform.deepseek.com
2. Log in or create a free account
3. Go to API Keys section
4. Click "Create key"
5. Copy the key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
6. Free tier available for testing

docsGrokText.message:
1. Visit https://x.ai
2. Log in or create a free account
3. Navigate to API section
4. Create a new API key
5. Copy the key and paste it in FavorAI Configuration
6. Limited free tier available

docsOllamaText.message:
1. Download Ollama from https://ollama.ai
2. Install and run Ollama on your computer
3. Open Terminal/CMD and pull a model: ollama pull llama2
4. Ollama runs at http://localhost:11434
5. In FavorAI Configuration: Set provider to Ollama, URL to http://localhost:11434
6. Completely free and private

docsPrivacyText.message:
• Titles, folder structure and URLs are sent to your configured AI provider for semantic classification
• Your API key is stored locally in your browser
• No data is sent to FavorAI servers
• Analysis happens in your browser
• You maintain full control over your bookmarks

docsTip1.message: 🔍 Start with "Minimal" mode to review changes before using "Complete"

docsTip2.message: ⚙️ Enable advanced link checks to detect redirects, dead links and duplicate articles across domains

docsTip3.message: 💾 History tab keeps the last 50 sessions for undo operations

docsTip4.message: 🔌 Different AI providers may suggest different organizations — experiment!

docsTip5.message: ✏️ You can customize the default prompts in the Configuration tab

configMissingDesc.message: No API key or provider found. Go to Configuration tab to set up your AI provider (OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, etc.)

forgottenDesc.message: Bookmarks you haven't visited for a while. Review them to keep your library clean.

forgottenHistoryNotice.message: Chrome only keeps ~90 days of browsing history. Bookmarks shown as 'No history' may have been visited more than 3 months ago — not necessarily never. Use the 30- or 60-day filters for reliable results.

forgottenNoneFound.message: ✅ No forgotten bookmarks found for this period.

forgottenError.message: ⚠️ Scan failed. Check that the history permission is granted.

forgottenConfirmDeleteAll.message: Delete all {n} shown bookmarks? This cannot be undone.

errBookmarksChangedBeforeApply.message: Bookmarks changed since analysis. Please run the analysis again before applying changes.

errRetryConfigMissing.message: Cannot retry: previous configuration was not found.
